message:
feat(vdbe,core): wire time-travel SQL to MVCC snapshot resolution

Connect the existing FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF syntax to the MVCC
time-travel implementation. The parser/AST/planner/codegen pipeline
was already complete; this wires the last mile:

- VDBE SetSnapshot handler stores TimeTravelMarker on cursors and
  upgrades cursor backends to TimeTravelPageIo when VersionStore
  is available
- Connection-level integration tests verify end-to-end SQL execution
  for both COMMITSEQ and timestamp-based time-travel queries
- Pager wal_frame_count() accessor for checkpoint advisor accuracy

Closes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
